description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-GenAI CI (Generic Runner) that triggers on pull requests, pushes, and manual workflow dispatches. The workflow runs on a matrix of python versions, CUDA versions, and compilers, and performs a multi-step build and test process for FBGEMM_GPU on GPU hosts, including setting up a build container, checking out the repository, installing dependencies, building and uploading a wheel artifact, and testing the artifact on GPU.
